headline: Booking Holdings Pet Travel Push And Board Refresh Underpins Valuation Gap
summary: Booking Holdings (NasdaqGS:BKNG) has partnered with DogPack to integrate pet friendly travel options into Booking.com. The company is expanding tools for travelers who prioritize pet accommodations, aiming to simplify planning for trips with animals. Booking Holdings has also appointed Kurt Sievers, former CEO of NXP Semiconductors, to its Board of Directors. These moves reflect a focus on digital product development and board refreshment at a time of change for online travel platforms. For...
